title: Peristylus bismarckiensis
taxonomy: Peristylus bismarckiensis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subtribe Orchidinae and the tribe Orchideae. The subtribe Orchidinae is further divided into several genera, with Peristylus being one of them. This classification places Peristylus bismarckiensis within the larger orchid family, highlighting its distinct characteristics and evolutionary relationships. By examining the classification of Peristylus bismarckiensis, botanists can better understand its place within the plant kingdom.
